name: bioethics_mutual_aid_request_conflicts_lumen_tru_loy
premise: A biobank discovered samples were collected under an expired protocol version; IRB quorum cannot convene until tomorrow. In Bioethics, the situation tagged internally around bioethics mutual aid request conflicts lumen tru loy has converged with local pressure in the Marlow Junction corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. Finance notes that the fastest mitigation spends down a restricted reserve that another program legally depends on next quarter. Key facts are still arriving from the field; the team is working off stale dashboards and verbal handoffs. Regulators or auditors are en route with a ninety-minute ETA; the first documented response will anchor every later question. Framing has already hardened externally as truth against loyalty; internal nuance will not survive the first news cycle unless it is extremely careful.

agents.name: Ravi Berg
agents.identity: I am Ravi Berg, the senior manager who must reconcile legal, ops, and customer-facing reality in one decision in Bioethics. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat loyalty as disposable collateral every time truth spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Fatima Ibrahim
agents.identity: I am Fatima Ibrahim, the counsel or integrity officer watching downstream liability in Bioethics. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so truth cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes loyalty in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will insist on verified facts before external commitments, split comms into facts versus hypotheses, and accept delay cost to protect integrity aligned with loyalty.
I will align public messaging with operational necessity now and correct later if needed—accepting reputational and trust risk to loyalty to preserve operational truth.
forced_choice.call_to_action: The next irreversible system or legal step is imminent. Ravi Berg must choose under truth versus loyalty. What does Ravi Berg do?
